{
  "ranked_concepts": [
    {"text": "Donald Trump", "rank": 1, "centrality": "topic_core", "note": "the individual the edits aim to implicate"},
    {"text": "Trump campaign", "rank": 2, "centrality": "topic_core", "note": "the campaign alleged to have welcomed interference"},
    {"text": "2016 US election", "rank": 3, "centrality": "topic_core", "note": "the election that Russian interference targeted"},
    {"text": "Robert Mueller", "rank": 4, "centrality": "primary", "note": "special counsel who led the investigation"},
    {"text": "special counsel investigation", "rank": 5, "centrality": "primary", "note": "Mueller's formal probe into interference"},
    {"text": "Special Counsel's report", "rank": 6, "centrality": "primary", "note": "the report summarizing Mueller's findings"},
    {"text": "Mueller's findings", "rank": 7, "centrality": "primary", "note": "conclusions about Russian interference and contacts"},
    {"text": "Senate Intelligence Committee", "rank": 8, "centrality": "primary", "note": "congressional body that produced a multi-volume report"},
    {"text": "Russian government", "rank": 9, "centrality": "primary", "note": "actor said to have conducted interference"},
    {"text": "extensive campaign", "rank": 10, "centrality": "primary", "note": "phrase describing the scope of Russian actions"},
    {"text": "Trump's own advisers", "rank": 11, "centrality": "primary", "note": "advisers alleged to have assisted Russian efforts"},
    {"text": "intelligence community assessment", "rank": 12, "centrality": "primary", "note": "the Jan 2017 US intelligence evaluation of interference"},
    {"text": "Russian officials", "rank": 13, "centrality": "primary", "note": "contacts between campaign and Russian personnel"},
    {"text": "conspiracy or coordination charges", "rank": 14, "centrality": "primary", "note": "legal charges not brought against Trump or associates"},
    {"text": "Russian citizens", "rank": 15, "centrality": "primary", "note": "individuals indicted for interfering or hacking"},
    {"text": "Russian organizations", "rank": 16, "centrality": "primary", "note": "entities indicted for participating in interference"},
    {"text": "associated Americans", "rank": 17, "centrality": "primary", "note": "Americans indicted or convicted related to investigations"},
    {"text": "May 2017", "rank": 18, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "date Mueller took over the FBI's work"},
    {"text": "March 2019", "rank": 19, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "month Mueller's investigation concluded"},
    {"text": "April 2019", "rank": 20, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "when the Special Counsel's report was made public"},
    {"text": "July 2019", "rank": 21, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "date of the first Senate report volume release"},
    {"text": "August 2020", "rank": 22, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "when the final Senate report volume was released"},
    {"text": "November 2020", "rank": 23, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "when additional Mueller passages were released"},
    {"text": "January 2017", "rank": 24, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "date of the intelligence community assessment"},
    {"text": "July 2016", "rank": 25, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "month of the first WikiLeaks DNC publication"},
    {"text": "October 2016", "rank": 26, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "month of the second WikiLeaks DNC publication"},
    {"text": "WikiLeaks", "rank": 27, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "publisher of hacked DNC emails"},
    {"text": "Stone", "rank": 28, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "Roger Stone, associate linked to advance knowledge"},
    {"text": "Democratic National Committee", "rank": 29, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "organization whose emails were published"},
    {"text": "electronic thefts", "rank": 30, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "the hacks and thefts of campaign materials"},
    {"text": "U.S. criminal law", "rank": 31, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "legal framework cited as violated by interference"},
    {"text": "United States", "rank": 32, "centrality": "peripheral", "note": "country context for the investigations"},
    {"text": "Mueller's findings", "rank": 33, "centrality": "peripheral", "note": "duplicate concept reiterating Mueller conclusions"}
  ]
}

{
  "ranked_concepts": [
    {"text": "DDoS code", "rank": 1, "centrality": "topic_core", "note": "overall malicious software being obfuscated"},

    {"text": "DDoS timer function", "rank": 3, "centrality": "topic_core", "note": "specific function being obfuscated"},

    {"text": "dwTotalMilliseconds", "rank": 8, "centrality": "primary", "note": "total timer duration variable"},

    {"text": "dwHttpPackets", "rank": 23, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "HTTP packet count passed to stop function"},
    {"text": "dwSockPackets", "rank": 24, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "socket packet count passed to stop function"},

    {"text": "ulCheck", "rank": 26, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "integer accumulating checksum value"},
    {"text": "nCheck", "rank": 27, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "character value used in checksum loop"},
    {"text": "cVersion", "rank": 28, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "version string used in checksum composition"},
    {"text": "cOwner", "rank": 29, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "owner string used in checksum composition"},
    {"text": "sprintf", "rank": 30, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "function formatting the check string"},

    {"text": "bStoreParameter2", "rank": 33, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "second stored boolean parameter used initially"},
    {"text": "DEFAULT", "rank": 34, "centrality": "supporting", "note": "macro for buffer size in code"},
    {"text": "DWORD WINAPI", "rank": 35, "centrality": "peripheral", "note": "function signature specifier in declaration"},
    {"text": "LPVOID", "rank": 36, "centrality": "peripheral", "note": "generic pointer type used in signature"}
  ]
